response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The core legal references (Amendment 4, SB 7066, Fla. Stat. 98.0751, § 104.011, and Jones v. DeSantis) are real and accurately cited, but the document omits that Jones v. DeSantis was vacated en banc and the full Eleventh Circuit ultimately upheld SB 7066 in Jones v. Governor of Florida (2020), making the framing misleading, and there is no verifiable source confirming this specific guidance document was actually published by the Florida Division of Elections.
